org.docgene.model

Class XMLTodo

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLTodo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.ImportanceType, ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.ReviewElement, StyledElement, org.docgene.model.TodoElement

    public class XMLTodo
extends java.lang.Object
implements org.docgene.model.TodoElement, ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.ImportanceType
    Represent the content of a <todo> tag.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.ImportanceType

        CRITICAL, IMPORTANT, NORMAL

      Return the reason of the TODO.
